title: JmapRequestBuilder consuming-self pattern is well-suited for this use case
description: add_call takes mut self and returns Self. This enables fn-chain syntax without borrow-checker friction. &mut Self chains break because build(self) needs ownership. The consuming pattern is correct; conditional builds use builder = builder.add_call(...) reassignment. Future contributors should not suggest reverting to &mut Self.
close_reason: Fixed: to_value() uses json! macro, call_batch() detects duplicate call_ids, new() docstring updated
